subtitle: Pioneer of Luxury in Uzbekistan
p: This first-class hotel, located in the heart of Tashkent, offers you the highest level of comfort and service.
p1: Modern design, luxurious rooms and excellent service await you.
p2: Here you will find a SPA center, a restaurant and exclusive relaxation areas.
overview_p1: Our hotel offers 146 elegant rooms and suites, as well as modern conference halls for business meetings and events.
overview_p2_part1: On the 10th floor there is an exquisite
overview_p2_end: with a panoramic view of the city.
overview_p3: You will enjoy: SPA complex, modern fitness center, infinity pool and jacuzzi — everything for your comfort and relaxation.
p3: Afrosiyob Regency Hotel is a space where refined atmosphere, modern comfort and sincere hospitality come together. Every detail is thoughtfully designed with care for our guests, so that your stay becomes truly pleasant and memorable.
p4: Throughout the hotel, modern amenities are available to ensure a high level of comfort for both leisure and business meetings and events.
p5: The hotel features 146 elegant rooms with stunning panoramic views of the city. For guests who value privacy and a higher level of service, there is an exclusive Afrosiyob Lounge — the perfect place for relaxation and business meetings.
p6: The hotel's congress center with an area of over 1500 sq.m offers 12 modern halls equipped with everything necessary for events of any format — from intimate negotiations to large celebrations in the luxurious Ballroom, which can accommodate up to 900 guests.
p7: The restaurant on the top floor invites guests to enjoy exquisite Asian cuisine and premium dry-aged steaks, complemented by a breathtaking view of the city. The open-air bar offers signature cocktails in an atmosphere of lightness and comfort.
p8: The hotel also features unique spaces: No‘mad — a green oasis inspired by Central Asian culture, and Chach — an elegant lobby bar with exquisite pastries and desserts.
p9: The two-level SPA and fitness club, created in collaboration with E’quilibrium Raison d’Etre, offers a wide range of services for recovery and relaxation: a modern gym with Technogym equipment, a 30-meter infinity pool, private SPA suites with city views, a Finnish sauna, hammam and an open terrace with the Pure healthy food bar.
p10: The spacious fitness hall with panoramic windows is equipped with equipment from the leading Italian brand Technogym, creating ideal conditions for training. Personal trainer services are available upon request.
p11: At Afrosiyob Regency, we pay attention to every guest, taking into account individual wishes and creating an atmosphere you want to return to again and again. Our team strives to make your stay truly special.
h11: In the Heart of the City
li: AFROSIYOB REGENCY HOTEL is located in the center of the capital, surrounded by many attractions:
li2: 15 minutes walk to Ming Urik Museum — 500 m
li3: 15 minutes walk to Railway Technology Museum — 800 m
li4: 10 minutes walk to Tashkent Central Railway Station — 700 m
li5: 15 minutes walk to Mirabad Agricultural Market — 1.31 km
classic_desc: Elegant interior designed for relaxation and productive work.
classic_details: 33m² • King-size bed • Smart TV • Superior comfort
luxury_desc: Spacious suite with a separate living room and stunning city views.
luxury_details: 65 m² • Living room • Balcony • Premium service
restaurant_desc: Gastronomic art with a panoramic view of the city.
restaurant_menu: Rock shrimp in creamy spicy sauce
bar_desc: Summer terrace with city views and sunsets.
bar_extra: Seasonal cocktail menu — every visit is unique
event_intro_desc: Modern equipment, gourmet cuisine and a professional team guarantee the successful hosting of events.
ballroom_desc: 820 m² space for up to 900 guests.
conference_desc: 250 m² conference halls with modern equipment.
name: Name
fitness_desc1: Enjoy a healthy lifestyle with high-end Artis equipment from TechnoGym surrounded by serene city views. Panoramic windows help maintain not only a healthy body, but also a healthy mind.
fitness_desc2: E’quilibrium Wellness Club is open to Tashkent residents and offers wellness lifestyle memberships, including access to all facilities, special deals on treatments and retail, invitations to exclusive club events and special member prices in hotel restaurants and bars.
pure_desc: Relax and enjoy the mesmerizing city view while diving into the magnificent 30-meter infinity pool. At Pure Bar, guests are offered fresh juices, smoothies, cocktails, herbal teas and light snacks.
spa_desc1: The philosophy of E'quilibrium comes from the Latin word meaning 'balance'. Achieving balance requires harmonious rest that helps reveal new strength and find peace.
spa_desc2: Soothing treatments and internationally trained specialists at the E'quilibrium SPA center will help every guest achieve harmony and replenish inner energy resources so necessary in the modern pace of life.
premium_desc1: Thanks to exclusive partnerships, our SPA center is the first in the country to offer body and face treatments with two luxury skincare brands: award-winning 111SKIN (London, UK) and innovative ComfortZone (Parma, Italy).
premium_desc2: Celebrity favorites — Déesse LED face masks and Normatec Recovery Boots — are also among the unique treatments offered.

service_desc_2: Professional treatments and relaxation at the SPA center
service_desc_3: Exquisite cuisine in the hotel restaurants
